11211.name: Will-o'-the-Wisp
11211.description: Attacks the enemy 3 times with a shimmering light, each hit leaving a Branding effect for 2 turns with a 15% chance and freezing for 1 turn with a 10% chance.

11211.name: Soul Snatcher
11211.description: Attacks the enemy with a soul bead to steal 1 beneficial effect and absorbs its Attack Bar by 30%. In addition, recovers your HP by 50% of the damage dealt.

11211.name: Cleanse
11211.description: Inflicts damage to all enemies and removes beneficial effects on all enemies. Removes 1 harmful effect of allies afterwards and increases the Attack Bar of allies without harmful effects to be removed by 15% each.

11212.name: Will-o'-the-Wisp
11212.description: Attacks the enemy 3 times with a shimmering light, each hit leaving a Branding effect for 2 turns with a 15% chance and inflicting Continuous Damage for 3 turns with a 15% chance.

11212.name: Enchant
11212.description: Puts the enemy to sleep for 2 turns. Instantly recovers a turn when used.

11212.name: Phantom Light
11212.description: Attacks the enemy 5 times with a ball of light and recovers your HP by the amount of damage dealt. Each attack has a 50% chance to leave a Branding effect for 2 turns. Branded enemies receive 25% increased damage. Enemies defeated by this attack cannot be revived during battle.

11213.name: Will-o'-the-Wisp
11213.description: Attacks the enemy 3 times with a shimmering light, each hit leaving a Branding effect for 2 turns with a 15% chance and increasing the chance of landing a Glancing Hit for 2 turns with a 15% chance.

11213.name: Soul Snatcher
11213.description: Attacks the enemy with a soul bead to steal 1 beneficial effect and absorbs its Attack Bar by 30%. In addition, recovers your HP by 50% of the damage dealt.

11213.name: Sweet Talk
11213.description: Attacks the enemy and decreases the Attack Speed, Attack Power, and Defense for 2 turns. The damage dealt to enemies under harmful effects will be increased by 50%.

11214.name: Will-o'-the-Wisp
11214.description: Attacks the enemy 3 times with a shimmering light, each hit leaving a Branding effect for 2 turns with a 15% chance and disturbing the HP recovery for 2 turns with a 30% chance.

11214.name: Soul Snatcher
11214.description: Attacks the enemy with a soul bead to steal 1 beneficial effect and absorbs its Attack Bar by 30%. In addition, recovers your HP by 50% of the damage dealt.

11214.name: Reincarnate
11214.description: Removes all harmful effects on yourself and comes back to life with 100% HP and in a condition where you can use all other skills except [Reincarnate]. Additionally, you gain 50% increased Attack Power and Defense every time you use [Reincarnate] (accumulates up to 5 times). You instantly gain another turn after using the skill.

11215.name: Will-o'-the-Wisp
11215.description: Attacks the enemy 3 times with a shimmering light, leaving a Branding effect for 2 turns with a 15% chance each and recovering the HP by 50% of the inflicted damage.

11215.name: Enchant
11215.description: Puts the enemy to sleep for 2 turns. Instantly recovers a turn when used.

11215.name: Nightmare
11215.description: Attacks the enemy and is guaranteed to stun the target if the attack lands as a Critical Hit. The attack will always land as a Critical Hit if the target is asleep, and stuns the enemy for the same number of turns as the Sleep turns the enemy has.

11611.name: Ice Drop
11611.description: Attacks the enemy with a small piece of ice to freeze for 1 turn with a 35% chance. The effect activation chance increases to 100% if the enemy's HP status is better than yours.

11611.name: Aqua Frenzy
11611.description: Attacks all enemies with a burst of water pillar and increases their chance of Glancing Hits for 2 turns with a 50% chance. Additionally, this attack will heal an ally with the lowest HP by 35%.

11611.name: Revive
11611.description: Revives a dead ally with 40% HP and grants immunity for 1 turn. Grants Soul Protection for 3 turns if this skill is used on an alive ally. In addition, decreases the skill cooldown time of [Revive] by 2 turns whenever an ally is defeated.

11612.name: Fire Drop
11612.description: Attacks the enemy with a small fire burst to decrease Attack Power for 2 turns with a 50% chance. The effect activation chance increases to 100% if the enemy's Attack Power is higher than yours.

11612.name: Fire Frenzy
11612.description: Attacks all enemies with a fire pillar and disturbs their HP recovery for 2 turns with a 50% chance. Additionally, this attack will heal an ally with the lowest HP by 35%.

11612.name: Share Life
11612.description: Evenly matches the percentage of the HP of all allies and removes 1 harmful effect granted on them. Additionally, all allies recover 25% of their HP.

11613.name: Lightning Drop
11613.description: Attacks the enemy with a quick burst of lightning to decrease Attack Speed for 2 turns with a 50% chance. The effect activation chance increases to 100% if the enemy's Attack Speed is faster than yours.

11613.name: Mind Shock
11613.description: Inflicts damage on an enemy with a strong shock and grants Oblivion effect for 2 turns after putting the target's skill on cooldown.

11613.name: Spirit's Blessing
11613.description: Removes all harmful effects on all allies, also granting Immunity for 2 turns and recovering 30% of their HP.

11614.name: Light Drop

11614.name: Mind Shock
11614.description: Inflicts damage on an enemy with a strong shock and grants Oblivion effect for 2 turns after putting the target's skill on cooldown.

11615.name: Dark Drop

11811.name: Spirit Throw
11811.description: Throws a small spirit at the enemy to attack, decreasing its Attack Bar by 30% with a 75% chance.

11811.name: Cyclone
11811.description: Attacks all enemies with a cyclone 2 times. Each attack has a 40% chance of increasing the enemy's chance of landing a Glancing Hit for 2 turns. Also, reduces the Attack Bar by 75% if you attack an enemy under the Decrease Attack Speed effect with each attack.

11811.name: Hailstorm

11812.name: Turbulence

11815.name: Spirit Throw

11815.name: Turbulence

Increases your Attack Bar by 5%, up to 20%, every time an ally is hit by a non-Critical Hit. The effect is not accumulated with other Critical Hit reduction effects. [Automatic Effect]

22114.description: Recovers the HP of the allies granted with harmful effects by 20% every turn. Creates a shield that's equivalent to 15% of your HP on the allies with no harmful effects for 2 turns. [Automatic Effect]

22115.name: Flower Growing
22115.description: Attacks an enemy and absorbs the Attack Bar by 15% with a 50% chance.

22115.name: Earth Friends
22115.description: Attacks all enemies to decrease their Attack Speed for 2 turns with a 50% chance and their Attack Bar by 50%.

22115.name: Mandrake
22115.description: Attacks all enemies to increase the enemies' harmful effect duration by 1 turn and decrease the enemies' beneficial effect duration by 2 turns. In addition, deals additional damage by 15% of the enemy's MAX HP if the enemy (boss excluded) has a beneficial effect or harmful effect.

22211.name: Touch of Punishment
22211.description: Attacks an enemy and stuns the target for 1 turn with a 35% chance.

22211.name: Wild Blow
22211.description: Attacks an enemy to inflict damage that increases according to your Defense and recovers 30% of the inflicted damage as HP. In addition, when used in Beast Form, the damage you inflict will be increased by 20% and then transforms into Druid Form.

22211.name: Wild Cure
22211.description: Recovers the HP of all allies by 30% and increases their Attack Bar by 15%. When used in Druid Form, transforms into Beast Form afterwards and Provokes all enemies for 1 turn with a 50% chance.

22211.name: Druid's Wit (Passive)
22211.description: Removes all harmful effects granted on yourself and increases your Attack Bar by 100% if an ally's HP falls to 40% or below by receiving damage from an enemy. [Automatic Effect]

22212.name: Touch of Punishment
22212.description: Attacks an enemy and stuns the target for 1 turn with a 35% chance.

22212.name: Moonlight Flood
22212.description: Attacks all enemies and inflicts Continuous Damage for 2 turns. In addition, when used in Beast Form, attacks 2 times and transforms into Druid Form after the attack.

22212.name: Wild Roar
22212.description: Attacks all enemies and weakens their Attack Power and Defense for 2 turns. In addition, when used in Druid Form, transforms into Beast Form afterwards and Provokes all enemies for 1 turn with a 50% chance.

22212.name: Druid's Proficiency (Passive)
22212.description: Decreases the enemy's Attack Bar by 25% and increases your Attack Bar by 25% if your attack doesn't land as a Glancing Hit when you attack on your turn. [Automatic Effect]

22213.name: Touch of Punishment
22213.description: Attacks an enemy and stuns the target for 1 turn with a 35% chance.

22213.name: Wild Blow
22213.description: Attacks an enemy to inflict damage that increases according to your Defense and recovers 30% of the inflicted damage as HP. In addition, when used in Beast Form, the damage you inflict will be increased by 20% and then transforms into Druid Form.

22213.name: Forest of Living
22213.description: Revives a dead ally target with 30% HP. If the ally target is alive, casts Soul Protection for 3 turns and increases the Defense of all allies for 3 turns. In addition, when used in Druid Form, transforms into Beast Form afterwards and Provokes all enemies for 1 turn with a 50% chance.

22213.name: Druid's Secret Plan (Passive)
22213.description: Revives into Beast Form with 30% HP at the moment of death. In addition, decreases the cooldown of [Forest of Living] by 1 turn if you are attacked by an enemy who has a lower Defense than you. [Automatic Effect]

22214.name: Touch of Punishment
22214.description: Attacks an enemy and stuns the target for 1 turn with a 35% chance.

22214.name: Moonlight Flood
22214.description: Attacks all enemies and inflicts Continuous Damage for 2 turns. In addition, when used in Beast Form, attacks 2 times and transforms into Druid Form after the attack.

22214.name: Rage of Mother Nature
22214.description: Attacks all enemies to remove all beneficial effects granted on them and increase their chances of landing a Glancing Hit for 2 turns. In addition, when used in Druid Form, transforms into Beast Form afterwards and Provokes all enemies for 1 turn with a 50% chance.

22214.name: Druid's Agility (Passive)
22214.description: Counterattacks the target that attacked you with a 40% chance when you get attacked by the enemy. In addition, increases your Attack Bar by 20% after attacking. [Automatic Effect]

22215.name: Touch of Punishment
22215.description: Attacks an enemy and stuns the target for 1 turn with a 35% chance.

22215.name: Wild Blow
22215.description: Attacks an enemy to inflict damage that increases according to your MAX HP and recovers 30% of the inflicted damage as HP. In addition, when used in Beast Form, the damage you inflict will be increased by 20% and then transforms into Druid Form.

22215.name: Moonlight Grace
22215.description: Removes harmful effects granted on all allies and grants immunity on them for 2 turns. In addition, when used in Druid Form, transforms into Beast Form afterwards and Provokes all enemies for 1 turn with a 50% chance.

22215.name: Druid's Wisdom (Passive)
22215.description: Increases your Attack Bar by 20% when the beneficial effects granted on yourself get removed. Removes all of your harmful effects if you're under inability effect at the start of each turn. [Automatic Effect]

22413.name: Iron Throw
22413.description: Attacks the enemy and reduces the Attack Bar by 30% with a 50% chance.

22413.name: Atlas Stone
22413.description: Throws the weapon up in the sky and shares damage with all enemies by the amount of your MAX HP on your next turn. This attack can't be counterattacked.

22413.name: Weight of Survival (Passive)
22413.description: You can't counterattack or attack together with other allies while the weapon is not in your hand, but your Defense will be increased by 50%. Also decreases the cooldown time when you're attacked. [Automatic Effect]

22414.name: Iron Throw
22414.description: Attacks the enemy and reduces the Attack Bar by 30% with a 50% chance.

22414.name: Weak Spot Strike
22414.description: Attacks the enemy target and reduces the target's Attack Bar to 0. This attack will deal more damage according to your Defense. Also, this effect can't be resisted if the enemy is granted with harmful effect.

22414.name: Catastrophe
22414.description: Inflicts damage proportionate to your Defense on all Monsters except yourself, and Stuns all Monsters. This effect can't be resisted.

22415.name: Iron Throw
22415.description: Attacks the enemy and reduces the Attack Bar by 30% with a 50% chance.

22415.name: Atlas Stone
22415.description: Throws the weapon up in the sky and shares damage with all enemies by the amount of your MAX HP on your next turn. This attack can't be counterattacked.

22415.name: Weight of Death (Passive)
22415.description: You can't counterattack or attack together with other allies while the weapon is not in your hand, but offsets all the incoming damage that may cause you to die and instantly gains another turn. In addition, increases the damage of [Atlas Stone] by 15% whenever an ally or enemy dies, up to 30%. [Automatic Effect]

22611.name: Lightning Strike
22611.description: Attacks the enemy and steals one beneficial effect with a 50% chance.

22611.name: Learn Knowledge (Passive)
22611.description: Gains Knowledge by the number of granted beneficial effects when you or an enemy is granted with a beneficial effect. In addition, gains 1 Knowledge if you have 2 or fewer Knowledge at the start of your turn. You can have up to 5 Knowledge. [Automatic Effect]

22611.name: Forbidden Galdr
22611.description: Decreases the current HP of the enemy target (bosses excluded) by 10% for every Knowledge you have. If you have 5 Knowledge, decreases the target's MAX HP by 50% instead. After that, heals all allies by the decreased HP. This skill can be used when you have at least 1 Knowledge, and all Knowledge will be consumed once you use the skill.

22612.name: Lightning Strike
22612.description: Attacks the enemy and steals one beneficial effect with a 50% chance.

22612.name: Gain Knowledge (Passive)
22612.description: Gains Knowledge by the number of granted beneficial effects when you're granted with a beneficial effect. In addition, gains 1 Knowledge when you have 2 or less Knowledge at the start of your turn, and gains 3 Knowledge when an enemy or an ally gets defeated. You can have up to 5 Knowledge. [Automatic Effect]

22612.name: Start of Apocalypse
22612.description: Attacks the enemies in the order of low HP ratio to high HP ratio by the number of Knowledge you have, and the damage increases as you attack. If you have 5 Knowledge, destroys the enemy's MAX HP by 50% of the damage dealt. This skill can be used when you have at least 1 Knowledge, and all Knowledge will be consumed once you use the skill.

22613.name: Lightning Strike
22613.description: Attacks the enemy and steals one beneficial effect with a 50% chance.

22613.name: Gain Knowledge (Passive)
22613.description: Gains Knowledge by the number of granted beneficial effects when you're granted with a beneficial effect. In addition, gains 1 Knowledge when you have 2 or less Knowledge at the start of your turn, and gains 3 Knowledge when an enemy or an ally gets defeated. You can have up to 5 Knowledge. [Automatic Effect]

22613.name: Legacy of Knowledge (Passive)
22613.description: Attacks the enemy while ignoring the enemy's Defense by 15% for every Knowledge you have whenever you attack. If you have 5 Knowledge, use all of your Knowledge to attack while ignoring the enemy's Defense and having attribute advantage. In addition, if you get defeated while having Knowledge, you will use all of your Knowledge to be revived with 20% HP per Knowledge used. [Automatic Effect]

22614.name: Lightning Strike
22614.description: Attacks the enemy and steals one beneficial effect with a 50% chance.

22614.name: Learn Knowledge (Passive)
22614.description: Gains Knowledge by the number of granted beneficial effects when you or an enemy is granted with a beneficial effect. In addition, gains 1 Knowledge if you have 2 or fewer Knowledge at the start of your turn. You can have up to 5 Knowledge. [Automatic Effect]

22614.name: Eye of Pioneer (Passive)
22614.description: If an ally is attacked, uses one of your Knowledge to recover the attacked target's HP by 20% of the attacked target's MAX HP. If you have 5 Knowledge, recovers the attacked target's HP by 50% of the attacked target's MAX HP. [Automatic Effect]

22615.name: Lightning Strike
22615.description: Attacks the enemy and steals one beneficial effect with a 50% chance.

22615.name: Gain Knowledge (Passive)
22615.description: Gains Knowledge by the number of granted beneficial effects when you're granted with a beneficial effect. In addition, gains 1 Knowledge when you have 2 or less Knowledge at the start of your turn, and gains 3 Knowledge when an enemy or an ally gets defeated. You can have up to 5 Knowledge. [Automatic Effect]

22615.name: Endless Desire
22615.description: Absorbs 25% (10% instead if it's a Boss) of your Attack Power and Defense per Knowledge from the enemy target's Attack Power and Defense. In addition, if you have 5 Knowledge, steals all beneficial effects granted on the enemy and instantly gains another turn. This skill can be used when you have at least 1 Knowledge, and all Knowledge will be consumed once you use the skill. (Accumulates up to 10 times)

22711.name: Accurate Fire
22711.description: Attacks the enemy to inflict damage that ignores all beneficial effects that reduce damage taken.

22711.name: Suppressive Fire
22711.description: Removes all beneficial effects granted on the enemy target with a 70% chance, and deals damage that increases according the number of beneficial effects removed.

22711.name: Head Shot
22711.description: Aims the enemy's head and inflicts damage that ignores the target's Defense.

22712.name: Accurate Fire
22712.description: Attacks the enemy to inflict damage that ignores all beneficial effects that reduce damage taken.

22712.name: Hidden Aim
22712.description: Strikes the [Hidden Aim] pose. Increases the damage dealing to an enemy by 200% while in this pose, and increases the chances of receiving a Glancing Hit by 70% if you're attacked while in this pose. The [Hidden Aim] pose disables after you attack on your turn.

22712.name: Dead Eye (Passive)
22712.description: Decreases the Defense of the enemy with the worst HP status for 1 turn at the start of each turn. [Automatic Effect]

22713.name: Accurate Fire
22713.description: Attacks the enemy to inflict damage that ignores all beneficial effects that reduce damage taken.

22713.name: Hidden Aim
22713.description: Strikes the [Hidden Aim] pose. Increases the damage dealing to an enemy by 200% while in this pose, and increases the chances of receiving a Glancing Hit by 70% if you're attacked while in this pose. The [Hidden Aim] pose disables after you attack on your turn.

22713.name: Veteran (Passive)
22713.description: Increases the Attack Bar by 100% and increases the Attack Power for 1 turn whenever the enemy's attack lands as a Glancing Hit. [Automatic Effect]

22714.name: Accurate Fire
22714.description: Attacks the enemy to inflict damage that ignores all beneficial effects that reduce damage taken.

22714.name: Suppressive Fire
22714.description: Removes all beneficial effects granted on the enemy target with a 70% chance, and deals damage that increases according the number of beneficial effects removed.

22714.name: Snipe Preparation (Passive)
22714.description: Increases the Attack Bar by 25% whenever an enemy gains a beneficial effect from a skill and increases your Attack Power for 1 turn. [Automatic Effect]

22715.name: Accurate Fire
22715.description: Attacks the enemy to inflict damage that ignores all beneficial effects that reduce damage taken.

22715.name: Hidden Aim
22715.description: Strikes the [Hidden Aim] pose. Increases the damage dealing to an enemy by 200% while in this pose, and increases the chances of receiving a Glancing Hit by 70% if you're attacked while in this pose. The [Hidden Aim] pose disables after you attack on your turn.

22715.name: Reloading (Passive)
22715.description: Maintains the [Hidden Aim] pose and increases the Attack Bar by 50% when you defeat an enemy while in the pose. [Automatic Effect]

22911.name: Fire!
22911.description: Attacks the enemy 3 times. Each attack has a 30% chance to decrease the Attack Bar by 30%.

22911.name: Wild Shot!
22911.description: Attacks all enemies several times, decreasing their Defense for 2 turns with a 50% chance each. Attacks up to 8 times as the no. of enemies is less.

22911.name: Fatal Extinctive Bullet
22911.description: Attacks the enemy with a cannon gun, removes all beneficial effects granted on the target and blocks the target from receiving beneficial effects for 2 turns. Afterwards, inflicts damage on all enemies and decreases their Attack Bar by 100%.

22912.name: Fire!
22912.description: Attacks the enemy 3 times. Each attack has a 30% chance to decrease the Attack Bar by 30%.

22912.name: Wild Shot!
22912.description: Attacks all enemies several times, decreasing their Defense for 2 turns with a 50% chance each. Attacks up to 8 times as the no. of enemies is less.

22912.name: Fatal Mortar Bullet
22912.description: Attacks the enemy with a cannon gun and weakens the Defense and leaves a Branding effect for 2 turns with a 90% chance each. Afterwards, attacks all enemies to inflict damage that increases by 25% for every beneficial effect or harmful effect granted on the enemy.

22913.name: Fire!
22913.description: Attacks the enemy 3 times. Each attack has a 30% chance to decrease the Attack Bar by 30%.

22913.name: Focused 5 Shots
22913.description: Attacks the enemy 5 times. Each attack has a 50% chance to remove 1 beneficial effect and inflict Continuous Damage for 1 turn.

22913.name: Coy Revenge (Passive)
22913.description: Increases the damage you deal to enemies on your turn by 15% whenever an ally is attacked. This effect accumulates up to 5 times. When fully accumulated, all harmful effects granted on you are removed at the start of your turn. The increased damage resets after you attack on your turn. [Automatic Effect]

22913.name: Rolling Cannon
22913.description: Attacks the enemy target with a cannon gun, decreasing its Defense for 1 turn and granting Oblivion for 1 turn, and attacks all enemies to deal damage proportional to the no. of allies alive. This attack won't land as a Glancing Hit.

22914.name: Fire!
22914.description: Attacks the enemy 3 times. Each attack has a 30% chance to decrease the Attack Bar by 30%.

22914.name: Wild Shot!
22914.description: Attacks all enemies several times, decreasing their Defense for 2 turns with a 50% chance each. Attacks up to 8 times as the no. of enemies is less.

22914.name: Fatal Armor Bullet
22914.description: Attacks the enemy with a cannon gun and absorbs all of the Attack Bar. Afterwards, inflicts damage on all enemies and stuns them for 1 turn with a 50% chance.

22915.name: Fire!
22915.description: Attacks the enemy 3 times. Each attack has a 30% chance to decrease the Attack Bar by 30%.

22915.name: Focused 5 Shots
22915.description: Attacks the enemy 5 times. Each attack has a 50% chance to remove 1 beneficial effect and inflict Continuous Damage for 1 turn.

22915.name: One More Time! (Passive)
22915.description: After attacking an enemy during your turn, attacks the enemy once again with [Fire!] skill. If the enemy is defeated with the first attack, you will attack another enemy with the same skill. [Automatic Effect]

22915.name: Burst Cannon
22915.description: Attacks the enemy with a cannon gun and destroys the target's MAX HP by 100% of the inflicted damage. Additionally, your Attack Bar increases in proportion to the amount of the enemy's HP you destroyed. The damage increases according to your Attack Speed.

23015.name: Vampire Bat
23015.description: Attacks 2 times with a vampire bat and recovers HP by 30% of the inflicted damage.

23015.name: Weaken
23015.description: Attacks the enemy 3 times. Each attack weakens the enemy's Attack Power, decreases the enemy's Attack Speed and blocks beneficial effects for 2 turns with a 75% chance each.

23015.name: Blood Contract
23015.description: Makes the Blood Contract with all allies to grant the Vampire effect that heals their HP by 20% of the inflicted damage for 3 turns and increases their Attack Power for 3 turns. You instantly gain another turn after using this skill.

23111.name: Sword of Destruction
23111.description: Decreases the current HP of the enemy with the best HP status (Boss excluded) by 10%, and attacks the enemy target to inflict damage that's proportionate to the reduced HP.

23111.name: Madness Judgement
23111.description: Consumes half of your current HP to attack the enemy target. This attack will ignore a portion of the enemy's Defense as your HP status worsens.

23111.name: Repeated Nightmare (Passive)
23111.description: Glancing hit does not occur when you attack. If allies and enemies act for 12 turns when you are dead, you will revive with little HP and then gain a turn instantly. [Automatic Effect]

23112.name: Sword of Destruction
23112.description: Decreases the current HP of the enemy with the best HP status (Boss excluded) by 10%, and attacks the enemy target to inflict damage that's proportionate to the reduced HP.

23112.name: Devil's Bargain
23112.description: Absorbs all other allies' HP by 10% to attack all enemies dealing damage that's proportionate to the absorbed HP. Recovers the Attack Bar of all allies by 20% afterwards.

23112.name: Flames of Hell
23112.description: Always perform an attack that has an attribute advantage on all enemies. Blocks all enemies (boss excluded) from removing harmful effects for 2 turns. Inflicts Continuous Damage that can't be resisted by the number proportional to the damage dealt for 2 turns.

23113.name: Sword of Destruction
23113.description: Decreases the current HP of the enemy with the best HP status (Boss excluded) by 10%, and attacks the enemy target to inflict damage that's proportionate to the reduced HP.

23113.name: Devil's Bargain
23113.description: Absorbs all other allies' HP by 10% to attack all enemies dealing damage that's proportionate to the absorbed HP. Recovers the Attack Bar of all allies by 20% afterwards.

23113.name: Soul Stealer (Passive)
23113.description: No one except for the boss can be revived while you are on the battlefield. In addition, the damage you inflict on enemies will be increased by 20% each when an enemy or ally dies (accumulates up to 5 times). In addition, creates a shield equal to 20% of your MAX HP for 2 turns if you attack an enemy on your turn. [Automatic Effect]

23114.name: Sword of Destruction
23114.description: Decreases the current HP of the enemy with the best HP status (Boss excluded) by 10%, and attacks the enemy target to inflict damage that's proportionate to the reduced HP.

23114.name: Devil's Bargain
23114.description: Absorbs all other allies' HP by 10% to attack all enemies dealing damage that's proportionate to the absorbed HP. Recovers the Attack Bar of all allies by 20% afterwards.

23114.name: Red Battlefield (Passive)
23114.description: The Attack Bar of all allies will be increased by the proportion to the damage dealt, and the damage they deal on enemies will be increased by 50% at the most whenever all enemies and allies on the battlefield receive damage. [Automatic Effect]

23115.name: Sword of Destruction
23115.description: Decreases the current HP of the enemy with the best HP status (Boss excluded) by 10%, and attacks the enemy target to inflict damage that's proportionate to the reduced HP.

23115.name: Madness Judgement
23115.description: Consumes half of your current HP to attack the enemy target. This attack will ignore a portion of the enemy's Defense as your HP status worsens.

23115.name: Purgatory (Passive)
23115.description: When an enemy is defeated by your attack, revives one ally with HP equal to the damage dealt to the target. If an ally dies while you are dead, you will be revived with little HP, the cooldown of [Madness Judgement] will be reset, and your Attack Bar will be filled up. [Automatic Effect]

23311.name: Stone Claws
23311.description: Attacks the enemy to inflict damage that increases according to your Defense and stuns the enemy for 1 turn with a 30% chance. In addition, increases your Defense by 30%. (Accumulates up to 5 times)

23311.name: Earth Strike
23311.description: Inflicts damage on all enemies in proportion to your Defense and provokes them for 1 turn with an 80% chance each. Afterwards, you will be turned into a {stone_st} until the next turn starts.

23311.name: Statue of Robust (Passive)
23311.description: When the battle begins or if your turn ends with less than 70% HP, you will be turned into a {stone_st} until the next turn starts. The target that attacks you will have its Attack Power decreased for 2 turns when the target attacks you when you are turned into a statue. [Automatic Effect]

23312.name: Stone Claws
23312.description: Attacks the enemy to inflict damage that increases according to your Defense and stuns the enemy for 1 turn with a 30% chance. In addition, increases your Defense by 30%. (Accumulates up to 5 times)

23312.name: Destructive Claws
23312.description: Inflicts damage on the enemy in proportion to your Defense, destroys the target's HP by the amount of damage dealt and provokes for 1 turn. Afterwards, you will be turned into a {stone_st} until the next turn starts.

23312.name: Statue of Protection (Passive)
23312.description: When the battle begins or if your turn ends with 70% or higher HP, you will be turned into a {stone_st} until the next turn starts. The damage dealt on allies will be reduced gradually if the ally gets attacked with multiple hits when you are turned into a statue. This does not accumulate with other damage reduction effects. [Automatic Effect]

23313.name: Stone Claws
23313.description: Attacks the enemy to inflict damage that increases according to your Defense and stuns the enemy for 1 turn with a 30% chance. In addition, increases your Defense by 30%. (Accumulates up to 5 times)

23313.name: Earth Strike
23313.description: Inflicts damage on all enemies in proportion to your Defense and provokes them for 1 turn with an 80% chance each. Afterwards, you will be turned into a {stone_st} until the next turn starts.

23313.name: Statue of Pain (Passive)
23313.description: When you are turned into a {stone_st}, inflicts damage that's proportionate to your Defense to the target that attacks you. Also decreases your skill cooldown time when you get attacked. [Automatic Effect]

23314.name: Stone Claws
23314.description: Attacks the enemy to inflict damage that increases according to your Defense and stuns the enemy for 1 turn with a 30% chance. In addition, increases your Defense by 30%. (Accumulates up to 5 times)

23314.name: Earth Strike
23314.description: Inflicts damage on all enemies in proportion to your Defense and provokes them for 1 turn with an 80% chance each. Afterwards, you will be turned into a {stone_st} until the next turn starts.

23314.name: Statue of Trial (Passive)
23314.description: When you are turned into a {stone_st}, increases the skill cooldown time of the target that attacks you by 2 turns. The cooldown time can be increased over the MAX cooldown time for Monsters excluding the bosses. [Automatic Effect]

23315.name: Stone Claws
23315.description: Attacks the enemy to inflict damage that increases according to your Defense and stuns the enemy for 1 turn with a 30% chance. In addition, increases your Defense by 30%. (Accumulates up to 5 times)

23315.name: Destructive Claws
23315.description: Inflicts damage on the enemy in proportion to your Defense, destroys the target's HP by the amount of damage dealt and provokes for 1 turn. Afterwards, you will be turned into a {stone_st} until the next turn starts.

23315.name: Statue of Immortal (Passive)
23315.description: Turns into a {stone_st} when the battle begins with a 50% chance. Or, turns into a statue when your turn ends until the next turn starts with a 30% chance. You can't get defeated when you are turned into a statue. [Automatic Effect]

23511.name: Spear of Protector
23511.description: Attacks the enemy to decrease the Attack Speed for 2 turns with a 30% chance. The faster your Attack Speed compared to the enemy's, the greater damage you can inflict.

23511.name: Fast Link
23511.description: The faster your Attack Speed, the greater the damage becomes. Attacks the enemy with the beast 2 times. The beast's attack decreases the enemy's Defense for 1 turn, and the rider's attack decreases the enemy's Attack Bar by 25% and increases your Attack Bar by 25% for each harmful effect granted on the target.

23511.name: Start of Attacking
23511.description: Attacks the enemy with the beast 2 times. The beast's attack removes all beneficial effects granted on the enemy, and the rider's attack ignores the enemy's Defense by 25% for each beneficial effect the beast removed. Afterwards, the Attack Bar of other allies will be increased, up to 50%, in proportion to the enemy's lost HP from this attack.

23511.name: Rider (Passive)
23511.description: Dismounts the beast to battle when you're inflicted with damage that may cause you to die. [Automatic Effect]

23512.name: Spear of Protector
23512.description: Attacks the enemy to decrease the Attack Speed for 2 turns with a 30% chance. The faster your Attack Speed compared to the enemy's, the greater damage you can inflict.

23512.name: Fast Link
23512.description: The faster your Attack Speed, the greater the damage becomes. Attacks the enemy with the beast 2 times. The beast's attack decreases the enemy's Defense for 1 turn, and the rider's attack decreases the enemy's Attack Bar by 25% and increases your Attack Bar by 25% for each harmful effect granted on the target.

23512.name: Wild Steps (Passive)
23512.description: Gains Immunity effect for 1 turn when you attack on your turn, and decreases the effect of Attack Bar decreasing skills received from the enemy by 50%. Also, your Attack Speed increases by 10% whenever an ally's Attack Bar decreases due to enemy skills, up to 5 times. [Automatic Effect]

23512.name: Rider (Passive)
23512.description: Dismounts the beast to battle when you're inflicted with damage that may cause you to die. [Automatic Effect]

23513.name: Spear of Protector
23513.description: Attacks the enemy to decrease the Attack Speed for 2 turns with a 30% chance. The faster your Attack Speed compared to the enemy's, the greater damage you can inflict.

23513.name: Critical Link
23513.description: The faster your Attack Speed, the greater the damage becomes. Attacks the enemy with the beast 2 times. The beast's attack changes all beneficial effects granted on the target to Continuous Damage for 1 turn, and the rider's attack inflicts damage that increases by 15% for each harmful effect granted on the target.

23513.name: Gigantic Roar
23513.description: The rider increases the Attack Speed of all allies for 2 turns, and the beast attacks all enemies. Weakens the enemy's Defense for 2 turns if the enemy's Defense is lower than your Attack Power, and decreases the enemy's Attack Bar by 75% if the enemy's Attack Speed is slower than yours.

23513.name: Rider (Passive)
23513.description: Dismounts the beast to battle when you're inflicted with damage that may cause you to die. [Automatic Effect]

23514.name: Spear of Protector
23514.description: Attacks the enemy to decrease the Attack Speed for 2 turns with a 30% chance. The faster your Attack Speed compared to the enemy's, the greater damage you can inflict.

23514.name: Critical Link
23514.description: The faster your Attack Speed, the greater the damage becomes. Attacks the enemy with the beast 2 times. The beast's attack changes all beneficial effects granted on the target to Continuous Damage for 1 turn, and the rider's attack inflicts damage that increases by 15% for each harmful effect granted on the target.

23514.name: Wild Chase (Passive)
23514.description: The Attack Speed increases by 20% for each time an enemy gains a turn, up to 5 times. The increased Attack Speed resets when your turn ends. In addition, increases your Attack Speed for 1 turn and decreases the enemy's Defense for 1 turn with each attack. [Automatic Effect]

23514.name: Rider (Passive)
23514.description: Dismounts the beast to battle when you're inflicted with damage that may cause you to die. [Automatic Effect]

23515.name: Spear of Protector
23515.description: Attacks the enemy to decrease the Attack Speed for 2 turns with a 30% chance. The faster your Attack Speed compared to the enemy's, the greater damage you can inflict.

23515.name: Fast Link
23515.description: The faster your Attack Speed, the greater the damage becomes. Attacks the enemy with the beast 2 times. The beast's attack decreases the enemy's Defense for 1 turn, and the rider's attack decreases the enemy's Attack Bar by 25% and increases your Attack Bar by 25% for each harmful effect granted on the target.

23515.name: Late Night Ambush
23515.description: Attacks all enemies with the beast 2 times. The beast's attack silences the enemy for 1 turn with a 50% chance and sets the enemies' Attack Bar to 0 with a 100% chance. The rider's attack inflicts damage that increases up to 100% in proportion to the Attack Bar that the beast decreased.

23515.name: Rider (Passive)
23515.description: Dismounts the beast to battle when you're inflicted with damage that may cause you to die. [Automatic Effect]

23711.name: Mark of Brush Tip
23711.description: Attacks the enemy to decrease the Attack Bar by 30% with a 50% chance.

23711.name: Moon Drawn by Clouds

28213.name: Amputate

28215.name: Amputate

28311.description: Attacks all enemies to recover the HP by 30% of the inflicted damage, and decreases their Attack Speed for 2 turns with a 50% chance. While under the Thunderer state, the attack inflicts damage that increases according to your Defense and provokes all enemies for 2 turns.

If the incoming damage is less than 10% of your MAX HP, the duration of the Thunderer state increases by 1 turn. [Automatic Effect]

28311.name: The Sea Thunderer
28311.description: Falls under the Thunderer state that enhances your skills for 3 turns and instantly gains another turn. While under the Thunderer state, your Defense increases by 100%. [Automatic Effect]

28312.name: The Flame Thunderer

29013.description: Removes 1 beneficial effect granted on all enemies and absorbs their Attack Bar by 15% each. In addition, absorbs 10% more Attack Bar if you successfully remove beneficial effects from each target.

29014.description: Attacks the enemy and creates a shield equal to 10% of your MAX HP on the ally with the lowest HP status for 2 turns. In addition, Sapsaree attacks the enemy and stuns for 1 turn with a 50% chance if you gain a turn while under inability effects.

29014.name: Jump!!
29014.description: Recovers the HP of all allies by 15% for 2 turns and grants immunity for 1 turn.

29014.name: Icing on the Cake (Passive)
29014.description: Recovers the HP of all allies by 10% at the start of your turn. The HP of allies granted with beneficial effects is recovered additionally by 10%. [Automatic Effect]

29015.name: Bring It Here!
29015.description: Attacks the enemy and creates a shield equal to 10% of your MAX HP on the ally with the lowest HP status for 2 turns. In addition, Sapsaree attacks the enemy and stuns for 1 turn with a 50% chance if you gain a turn while under inability effects.

29015.name: Run!!
29015.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times to decrease their Defense for 2 turns with a 50% chance each.

29015.name: Sapsaree Is My Friend (Passive)
29015.description: Increases the Attack Bar of the allies under inability effects by 30% at the start of your turn. In addition, you gain immunity to Attack Bar decreasing effects while under inability effects. [Automatic Effect]

29111.name: Horn of Charge
29111.description: Increases the ally target's Attack Bar by 10%.

29111.name: Horn of Courage
29111.description: Decreases the ally target's skill cooldown time by 1 turn.

29111.name: Horn of Protection
29111.description: Recovers the HP of all allies by 10% and creates a shield equal to 10% of your HP for 2 turns.

29112.name: Horn of Charge
29112.description: Increases the ally target's Attack Bar by 10%.

29112.name: Horn of Cheer
29112.description: Grants Immunity on all allies for 2 turns.

29112.name: Horn of Festival
29112.description: Decreases all allies' skill cooldown time by 1 turn each and increases your Attack Power for 1 turn.

29113.name: Horn of Charge
29113.description: Increases the ally target's Attack Bar by 10%.

29113.name: Horn of Cheer
29113.description: Grants Immunity on all allies for 2 turns.

29113.name: Horn of Initiation
29113.description: Increases all allies' Attack Speed for 2 turns.

29114.name: Horn of Charge
29114.description: Increases the ally target's Attack Bar by 10%.

29114.name: Horn of Courage
29114.description: Decreases the ally target's skill cooldown time by 1 turn.

29114.name: Horn of Victory
29114.description: Increases all allies' Attack Power for 2 turns.

29115.name: Horn of Charge
29115.description: Increases the ally target's Attack Bar by 10%.

29115.name: Horn of Cheer
29115.description: Grants Immunity on all allies for 2 turns.

29115.name: Horn of Fate
29115.description: Removes 1 harmful effect granted on the ally target and grants a turn instantly.

29211.name: Pirouette
29211.description: Attacks the enemy to decrease its Attack Power for 2 turns with a 50% chance.

29211.name: Whirl
29211.description: Attacks all enemies 3 times. Each hit decreases their Defense for 2 turns with a 30% chance and their Attack Bar by 20% with a 30% chance.

29211.name: Rend
29211.description: Attacks the enemy to stun for 1 turn and resets the Attack Bar. The damage is proportionate to the enemy's MAX HP. If the target is immune to stun, the skill cooldown of [Rend] decreases by 2 turns.

29212.name: Pirouette
29212.description: Attacks the enemy to decrease its Attack Power for 2 turns with a 50% chance.

29212.name: Whirl
29212.description: Attacks all enemies 3 times. Each hit decreases their Defense for 2 turns with a 30% chance and their Attack Bar by 20% with a 30% chance.

29212.name: Igni
29212.description: Attacks all enemies 3 times, with each hit inflicting Continuous Damage for 2 turns. Attacking the target under Continuous Damage stuns the target for 1 turn with a 70% chance. If the enemy has an inability effect after the attack, decreases the cooldown of [Igni] by 1 turn.

29213.name: Pirouette
29213.description: Attacks the enemy to remove 1 beneficial effect with a 50% chance and decrease its Attack Power for 2 turns with a 50% chance.

29213.name: Dancing Star
29213.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times. The first hit installs a bomb that detonates after 2 turns with a 90% chance, and the second hit stuns all enemies for 1 turn with a 50% chance.

29213.name: Metamorphosis (Passive)
29213.description: Whenever you grant harmful effects on the enemy with your skill, you grant yourself Shield, Immunity, or Counterattack for 2 turns each if the effect is not already applied to yourself. In addition, decreases the cooldown of [Dancing Star] by 1 turn if you have 2 or more beneficial effects after the turn ends. [Automatic Effect]

29214.name: Pirouette
29214.description: Attacks the enemy to decrease its Attack Power for 2 turns with a 50% chance.

29214.name: Whirl
29214.description: Attacks all enemies 3 times. Each hit decreases their Defense for 2 turns with a 30% chance and their Attack Bar by 20% with a 30% chance.

29214.name: Adrenaline Rush (Passive)
29214.description: Stacks 1 Adrenaline score whenever you attack the enemy, up to 5 scores. The damage you take decreases by up to 15% based on your Adrenaline score. At 3 or higher Adrenaline scores, [Whirl] can be used regardless of its skill cooldown time. You lose 1 Adrenaline score and increase your Attack Bar by 50% whenever you're attacked by the enemy. [Automatic Effect]

29215.name: Pirouette
29215.description: Attacks the enemy to increase the duration of harmful effects (excluding inability effects) granted on the target by 1 turn with a 50% chance and decrease its Attack Power for 2 turns with a 50% chance.

29215.name: Dancing Star
29215.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times. The first hit installs a bomb that detonates after 2 turns with a 90% chance, and the second hit stuns all enemies for 1 turn with a 50% chance.

29215.name: Alchemy (Passive)
29215.description: Increases the duration of beneficial effects granted by skills on yourself by 1 turn. Additionally, increases your Attack Power by 100%, up to 300%, and the harmful effect activation rate by 20% for every beneficial effect granted on yourself. However, your HP decreases by 10% if you gain a turn while you are granted with 3 or more beneficial effects. [Automatic Effect]

29311.name: Slash
29311.description: Attacks the enemy 2 times to inflict damage in proportion to your Attack Speed. Each hit increases the chances of landing a Glancing Hit for 2 turns with a 30% chance.

29311.name: Charge Attack
29311.description: Attacks the enemy to inflict damage that ignores its Defense up to 100% according to the difference between the target's and your Attack Speed.

29311.name: Lady of Space and Time (Passive)
29311.description: Your attacks always land as a Critical Hit when you attack the enemy with a slower Attack Speed than you. Critical Hits won't occur when you're attacked by the enemy with a slower Attack Speed than you. [Automatic Effect]

29312.name: Slash
29312.description: Attacks the enemy 2 times to inflict damage in proportion to your Attack Speed. Each hit increases the chances of landing a Glancing Hit for 2 turns with a 30% chance.

29312.name: Blink Strike
29312.description: Attacks the enemy 3 times to inflict damage proportionate to your Attack Speed and the enemy's MAX HP.

29312.name: Wolf School Training (Passive)
29312.description: Your Critical Rate increases in proportion to your Attack Speed. Additionally, if your Critical Rate exceeds 100%, your Critical Damage increases by the exceeded amount. [Automatic Effect]

29313.name: Slash

29313.name: Charge Attack

29313.name: Teleportation Slash
29313.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times, with each hit decreasing their Attack Speed for 2 turns. Afterwards, increases your Attack Bar by 35% in proportion to the number of enemies with slower Attack Speed than you.

29314.name: Slash

29314.name: Charge Attack

29412.name: Lightning Bolt
29412.description: Attacks the enemy to grant Oblivion for 2 turns with an 80% chance and stuns for 1 turn with a 30% chance.

29412.description: Steals 1 beneficial effect when you attack the enemy on your turn and decreases Attack Bar by 15%. In addition, spreads harmful effects granted on the attacked target to the enemy with the highest Attack Bar (excluding the target). [Automatic Effect]

29413.name: Crow Dive

29413.name: Magic Barrier
29413.description: Grants Immunity on all allies for 2 turns and creates a shield that's 20% of your MAX HP for 2 turns.

35915.description: Attacks the enemy to deal damage that increases according to your MAX HP. Afterwards, if there is an ally with HP below 70%, goes under the Threat state while enemies attack with a single-target skill 1 time.

35915.name: Lightning Strike!
35915.description: Attacks all enemies to stun for 1 turn with a 50% chance, dealing damage that increases according to your MAX HP. Recovers your HP by 5% per stunned enemy after the attack.

35915.name: Inheriting Master's Will (Passive)
35915.description: Increases your Attack Bar by 20% when using [Heavy Strike], and deals additional damage equal to 15% of your MAX HP when using [Lightning Strike!]. In addition, removes 1 harmful effect granted on yourself when you gain a turn with less than 50% HP. [Automatic Effect]

36011.name: Reelseiden
36011.description: Attacks the enemy and Stuns the target for 1 turn with a 30% chance.

36011.name: Reelseiden・Flurry
36011.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times. The first hit decreases their Defense for 2 turns with a 50% chance, and the second hit disturbs HP recovery for 2 turns with a 50% chance.

36011.name: Sharp Intuition (Passive)
36011.description: Deals damage that ignores all beneficial effects that reduce damage taken when you attack. In addition, if the enemy's MAX HP is higher than yours, increases your Critical Rate to 100%. [Automatic Effect]

36012.name: Reelseiden
36012.description: Attacks the enemy and Stuns the target for 1 turn with a 30% chance.

36012.name: Reelseiden・Ambush
36012.description: Attacks the enemy to stun for 1 turn with a 70% chance and leave a Branding effect for 2 turns with a 70% chance.

36012.name: Reelseiden・Havoc
36012.description: Attacks the enemy 3 times to inflict 1 Continuous Damage for 2 turns each. If the target is not a boss, deals fixed damage equal to 5% of its MAX HP for each Continuous Damage granted on the target.

36013.name: Reelseiden
36013.description: Attacks the enemy and Stuns the target for 1 turn with a 30% chance.

36013.name: Reelseiden・Ambush
36013.description: Attacks the enemy to stun for 1 turn with a 70% chance and leave a Branding effect for 2 turns with a 70% chance.

36013.name: Severing Edge (Passive)
36013.description: When attacking on your turn, attacks the target 2 to 3 more times to decrease its Defense for 2 turns. [Automatic Effect]

36014.name: Reelseiden
36014.description: Attacks the enemy and Stuns the target for 1 turn with a 30% chance.

36014.name: Reelseiden・Ambush
36014.description: Attacks the enemy to stun for 1 turn with a 70% chance and leave a Branding effect for 2 turns with a 70% chance.

36014.name: Sorganeil
36014.description: Attacks the enemy to stun for 1 turn and block the target from removing harmful effects for 1 turn. This effect cannot be resisted.

36015.name: Reelseiden
36015.description: Attacks the enemy and Stuns the target for 1 turn with a 30% chance.

36015.name: Reelseiden・Flurry
36015.description: Attacks all enemies 2 times. The first hit decreases their Defense for 2 turns with a 50% chance, and the second hit disturbs HP recovery for 2 turns with a 50% chance.

36015.name: Empathy (Passive)
36015.description: Grants 1 random harmful effect that was applied in the current battle on the enemy for 1 turn whenever you attack. [Automatic Effect]

1000111.name: Magic Ray
1000111.description: Attacks the enemy with the power of condensed magic.

1000111.name: Magic Bullet
1000111.description: Throws a magic ball to attack the enemy target and weakens the Defense for 2 turns with a 50% chance.

1000111.name: Magic Power Burst
1000111.description: Attacks the enemy target to inflict damage. The damage increases by 20% for each harmful effect on the enemy.

1000111.name: Magic Power Explosion (Passive)
1000111.description: Revives with 50% HP when you're inflicted with fatal damage and falls under the Magic Power Explosion state for 2 turns. The Magic Power Explosion state will increase the damage inflicted to the enemies by 30%, but you'll be uncontrollable and die when the effect ends. [Automatic Effect]

1000214.description: Uses Mana to attack the enemy and inflict damage.

1000214.name: Protection Field
1000214.description: Creates a shield that absorbs damage proportionate to your level on all allies and increases their Defense for 2 turns.

1000214.name: Magic Power Explosion II (Passive)
1000214.description: Revives with 50% HP when you're inflicted with fatal damage, and resets the skill cooldown time of all skills and falls under the Magic Power Explosion state for 2 turns. You'll be uncontrollable under the Magic Power Explosion state and be defeated when the effect ends. [Automatic Effect]
